note: Seed trend feed for R2 (manual pick). R4 replaces this with automated TikTok/Reels/app-store/itch.io scrapers.

trends.theme: how far can your thumb scroll in 10 seconds
trends.why: Manuel 2026-07-17: the scroll gesture as a RACE in absurd real units (ft/in + mph of thumb); dare links make the score the distribution vector

trends.theme: dopamine chain on the scroll gesture; the fail IS the payoff
trends.why: Manuel 2026-07-17: combine bottom-of-the-feed's swipe path with a hit/push/place dopamine loop that climaxes at failure — peak-end rule engineered: fail = peak = end → euphoric memory + the fail frame is the clip

MINED demand (harvest 2026-07-17): doomscrollers' own UMP = 'no edges'; blockers add walls not endings; the unbuilt game = the itch-gesture with a bottom. Verbatim bank in engine/state/mined/synthesis-20260717.md

trends.theme: a button that says DO NOT PRESS

night-run: participatory clips (viewer plays the video itself, pauses, comments their round) have the strongest comment-rate mechanics
night-run: loss-aversion is the strongest scream-at-the-screen clip trick; balloon/crash mechanics evergreen
night-run: benchmark ego-bait (vs average human / F1 driver) — the concrete ms number is the share hook
night-run: near-perfection itch — 9.97/10.02 reveals make one-more-try feel guaranteed

trends.theme: shock-honesty: the game narrates its own manipulation
